primary_sources.title: Sabah State Election 2020 results; 17th Sabah State Election 29 November 2025 results
T4A issue 1701 (Sabah election Nov 2025): GRS 29 of 73 seats

notes: Sabah Chief Minister since September 2020. GRS chairman; left Bersatu December 2022 to consolidate GRS as Sabah-local coalition. Won 17th state election November 2025 with 29 of 73 seats (T4A issue 1701) — plurality without majority. The Sabah-First posture his coalition embodies is the structural counter to Peninsular-led federal arithmetic.
